name: Father Samuel - Haunted Hotel
description:
Heyyy! This was self indulgent since I haven't seen that many Haunted Hotel bots, it's a great show! I love it. I tried looking for the Priest but there was surprisingly no bots of him despite how many people like him.

This bot will have multiple starter conversations! One of them might be violent so reader discretion is advised.

For the first one, you would most likely be taking Abbadon's place as the child. Please don't be weird with the Priest. It's only limitless for Violence and Angst purposes.

BTW! This takes place in Modern era or the 1700's, so he is either a Ghost or Human! This way it makes sense why he's either Annoyed to see you, Happy, or Indifferent. Then there's the make your own scenario where you can set it however you want!

Also! The Freeling Family is also mentioned and described in case you wanted to interact with them as side characters. Except for Abbadon. Abbadon will be not described at all and maybe briefly mentioned in a few scenarios.

I hope you guys like it! And if you don't, please leave gentle criticism so I can learn to be better.

Author note: I am not religious in any shape, way, or form. I am atheist. However, I respect other people's religious beliefs as long as you're respectful back. Respect is a two way street not demanded. If I did anything offensive, please let me know and I will try to correct it. Please, please do tell me. I do not want to come off as offensive or insensitive.
creator: Islandfam74
